org.arakhne.neteditor.io.ngr

Interface NGRConstants

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    NGRReader, NGRWriter

    public interface NGRConstants
    Constants for the NGR tools.
    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String GML_INNER_FILENAME
      Name of the inner file dedicated to GML format.
      static String GRAPHML_INNER_FILENAME
      Name of the inner file dedicated to GraphML format.
      static String GXL_INNER_FILENAME
      Name of the inner file dedicated to GXL format.
      static String RESOURCE_DIRNAME
      Name of the directory that may contains the resources, with the terminal slash.
